originalTitle: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
title: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
content: The country's biggest musician Teddy Afro laments a lack of unity in the country on his new track.

originalTitle: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
title: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
content: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.

originalTitle: Zimbabwe's iconic stone birds were taken by colonialists. Finally, they're all back home
title: Zimbabwe's iconic stone birds were taken by colonialists. Finally, they're all back home
content: For centuries the prized sculptures, central to national identity, have been kept outside Zimbabwe's borders.

originalTitle: Mexico arrests suspected Hungarian drug trafficker amid crime crackdown
title: Mexico arrests suspected Hungarian drug trafficker amid crime crackdown
content: Fugitive Janos Balla, 48, was arrested in Quintana Roo as President Claudia Sheinbaum seeks to increase cartel arrests.

originalTitle: Sudanese refugees trapped between borders and bureaucracy in Morocco
title: Sudanese refugees trapped between borders and bureaucracy in Morocco
content: A growing number of Sudanese refugees are arriving into Morocco after fleeing war, but find themselves stuck.

originalTitle: Ukraine police shoot dead gunman who killed six in Kyiv, took hostages
title: Ukraine police shoot dead gunman who killed six in Kyiv, took hostages
content: The attacker has been identified as a "58-year-old Moscow man", but no motive has been established.

originalTitle: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
content: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.

originalTitle: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
title: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
content: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.

originalTitle: Mexico's Sheinbaum denies 'diplomatic crisis' with Spain after conquest row
title: Mexico's Sheinbaum denies 'diplomatic crisis' with Spain after conquest row
content: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.

originalTitle: Iraola bowing out in style - where will he go next?
title: Iraola bowing out in style - where will he go next?
content: Any suggestion of distraction following Andoni Iraola's decision to leave Bournemouth was firmly dismissed by his players in their statement victory against Newcastle.

originalTitle: Leading Dunfermline to final 'up there with anything' for Lennon
title: Leading Dunfermline to final 'up there with anything' for Lennon
content: Dunfermline's penalty shootout victory over Falkirk on Saturday means they await the winners of Sunday's second semi-final between Celtic and St Mirren.

originalTitle: Bromley promoted to League One for first time
title: Bromley promoted to League One for first time
content: Bromley are promoted to League One for the first time in the club's history after Notts County's defeat by Barnet.
